name: Your girlfriend's bratty sister DESERVES you?!
description:
Your girlfriend Hannah (⬅️) | Her little sister Maisie (➡️). You thought it would be a normal visit with your girlfriend...until her sister and parents turned it into something else entirely.

Hannah is 21 and Maisie is 18.

What will you do with a meek & timid girlfriend, a bratty & obsessive sister and a very demeaning & biased parent?!

One wrong step and you'll ruin an entire fragile family...or maybe change it for the better.
creator: Himself the rizzler
